Motivation
Summary of Changes

sglang.title: Use more general heuristics to set the default value of --mem-fraction-static
sglang.author: merrymercy

Clean up the settings of chunked prefill size, mem fraction static in server_args.py. Make the heuristics more general.

We only want to check the gpu_mem once with a single if/else chain. According to gpu_mem, we set chunked_prefill_size, and cuda_graph_max_bs
Then we set mem_fraction_static accord

sglang.title: [router][tool call] Separate `JsonParser` and `LlamaParser`
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

The JsonParser implementation had become overly complex, attempting to handle multiple customized scenarios through TokenConfig while only being actively used by LlamaParser. This complexity made the code harder to maintain and understand. Additionally, there were issues with error handl

sglang.title: Use `get_pooled` in `process_single_choice`
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The current process_single_choice uses .create() which creates a fresh instance every time, bypassing the pool. It is inefficient.
ParserFactory actually has a registry with pooling.

Modifications

Use pooled parser with mutex in process_single_choice in grpc router


Accuracy Tests

Ben

sglang.title: [router][grpc] Add logprobs support to router
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Add comprehensive logprobs support to the gRPC interface to enable:

Input and output logprobs for /generate endpoint
Support for echo parameter in /v1/completions endpoint (which includes input logprobs)
Consistent API behavior between HTTP and gRPC endpoints

Modifications
Proto Schema

    scheme = self.get_scheme(layer=laye

sglang.title: Enable optional FP32 compute for LM Head
sglang.author: narutolhy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Large-vocab matmul at the final projection (“LM Head”) can benefit from FP32 for numerical stability and HF parity (e.g., logprob alignment), while we still want the forward path (RMSNorm/Attn/MLP) to stay in BF16/FP16 for performance and CUDA Graph stability.
This PR adds an opt-in flag

sglang.title: Update CODEOWNERS for attention/ascend_backend.py
sglang.author: merrymercy

sglang.title: [router] grpc router generate endpoint support
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Changes
Added end-to-end /generate support to the Rust gRPC router.

The router now mirrors the Python flow: it resolves text/prompt/input_ids through the router's tokenizer,
builds a proto::GenerateRequest via the new plain-generate helper,
selects a gRPC worker
streams back the scheduler’s complet

sglang.title: [router][tool call] Full support for ToolChoice
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Add full support for tool_choice options in the gRPC router's OpenAI-compatible interface to enable fine-grained control over tool calling behavior:

tool_choice: "required" - Force model to call one or more tools
tool_choice: {"type": "function", "name": "X"} - Force model to call a spe

sglang.title: Fix spec filter batch when target extend
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Background: #9252
For target extend, we should set has_been_filtered=False, since it's actually not been filtered. has_been_filtered should be set to True only when the batch in the target verify mode.
Otherwise, in the last round of chunked prefill, the chunked prefill req will be exclud

sglang.title: [Fix] Resolve performance drop in speculative decoding aiter backend
sglang.author: yichiche
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR addresses a regression in speculative decoding performance on the aiter backend. The issue caused significant throughput degradation compared to expected levels, and the fix restores normal performance without affecting accuracy.
Modifications

Adjusted speculative decoding logic

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Use correct key "ignore" for config.json non-quantized layers
vllm.author: leejnau
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix a bug wherein the dictionary key was incorrect for the Hugging Face config.json quantization layers to be ignored (non-quantized layers).  For the legacy hf_quant_config.json file, the key is "exclude_modules".  For the more modern in-place config.json the key is "ignore".

vllm.title: [Kernel] Chunk-aligned mamba2
vllm.author: tdoublep
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR changes the way that the mamba2 kernels split the batch into "chunks". The change ensures that (a) no chunk ever contains more than one sequence, and (b) all intermediate states are computed at the chunk boundaries within each sequence.
This change is useful for three reasons:

It dr

vllm.title: [NIXL] Increase default KV block eviction timeout on P
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Default timeout value is too low, as we have emperically validated it is quite easy to stack up a lot of requests when running lm-eval on a big model and trigger early evictions P side.
